title.source: How can you edit your comments, inputs and votes on the platform?
title.target: How can you edit your comments, inputs and votes on the platform?

description.source: How to contribute to a project and think along with other participants.
description.target: How to contribute to a project and think along with other participants.

body:0002.source: Contributions on the platform include comments, inputs (ideas, proposals, or posts), and votes.
body:0002.target: Contributions on the platform include comments, inputs (ideas, proposals, or posts), and votes.

body:0003.source: Participants can create and edit their own content during active phases
body:0003.target: Participants can create and edit their own content during active phases

body:0004.source: Admins and project managers can moderate, edit, or add inputs and votes depending on permissions
body:0004.target: Admins and project managers can moderate, edit, or add inputs and votes depending on permissions

body:0005.source: Customization options in project setup determine which actions are enabled
body:0005.target: Customization options in project setup determine which actions are enabled

body:0007.source: In Projects → Setup tab, toggle whether participants can submit posts, comments, or reactions.
body:0007.target: In Projects → Setup tab, toggle whether participants can submit posts, comments, or reactions.

body:0008.source: Optionally disable dislikes or set vote limits per participant
body:0008.target: Optionally disable dislikes or set vote limits per participant

body:0009.source: Admins can still add submissions after a phase has ended
body:0009.target: Admins can still add submissions after a phase has ended

body:0014.source: How to edit or delete comments and inputs?
body:0014.target: How to edit or delete comments and inputs?

body:0016.source: Comments: Locate your comment → Click the three dots → Edit/Delete
body:0016.target: Comments: Locate your comment → Click the three dots → Edit/Delete

body:0017.source: Inputs: Locate your input → Click the three dots → Edit/Delete
body:0017.target: Inputs: Locate your input → Click the three dots → Edit/Delete

body:0018.source: ⚠️ Inputs can be modified or deleted if the project is still active and not archived, once the idea’s status changes, the input becomes locked.
body:0018.target: ⚠️ Inputs can be modified or deleted if the project is still active and not archived, once the idea’s status changes, the input becomes locked.

body:0019.source: Votes: Locate the input you voted on → Click on the vote/like again to undo your vote
body:0019.target: Votes: Locate the input you voted on → Click on the vote/like again to undo your vote

body:0020.source: As an admin or project moderator:
body:0020.target: As an admin or project moderator:

body:0022.source: Inputs: add, edit, or remove inputs; submit ideas on behalf of others using the Author field.
body:0022.target: Inputs: add, edit, or remove inputs; submit ideas on behalf of others using the Author field.

body:0023.source: Votes: add offline votes on behalf of participants; cannot add or remove online votes.
body:0023.target: Votes: add offline votes on behalf of participants; cannot add or remove online votes.

body:0024.source: To edit an input as an admin or project moderator:
body:0024.target: To edit an input as an admin or project moderator:

body:0025.source: Open the Input Manager of the project phase
body:0025.target: Open the Input Manager of the project phase

body:0028.source: Update the title, description, or other fields
body:0028.target: Update the title, description, or other fields

body:0030.source: ℹ️ Only as an admin you can also submit on behalf of users by editing the Author field.
body:0030.target: ℹ️ Only as an admin you can also submit on behalf of users by editing the Author field.

body:0032.source: Click Submit your idea or a similar button (name depends on project setup)
body:0032.target: Click Submit your idea or a similar button (name depends on project setup)

body:0033.source: Complete the input form with a title, description, and any additional details
body:0033.target: Complete the input form with a title, description, and any additional details

body:0035.source: Enter coordinates or street name in the form, or
body:0035.target: Enter coordinates or street name in the form, or

body:0036.source: Pin directly on the project map
body:0036.target: Pin directly on the project map

body:0040.source: If enabled, click the thumbs-down icon to dislike
body:0040.target: If enabled, click the thumbs-down icon to dislike

body:0041.source: Undo a vote by clicking the same icon again
body:0041.target: Undo a vote by clicking the same icon again

body:0042.source: User names of voters cannot be exported; contact support if this data is required
body:0042.target: User names of voters cannot be exported; contact support if this data is required

body:0044.source: Click the speech bubble icon on the input
body:0044.target: Click the speech bubble icon on the input

body:0047.source: To address the author directly, type @username
body:0047.target: To address the author directly, type @username
